title: WoM Vanillafied
description: Resourcepack for the Epic Fight addon "Weapons of Miracles" which turns all of the weapon models to a more vanilla-friendly style.
body:
![Resourcepack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rvzn7nPl/images/81780a45b7861e9870915d0bf2c244c5373ac7d0.png)

### WoM Vanillafied - Resourcepack for "Weapons of Miracles"

A resource pack designed for the "Weapons of Miracles" Epic Fight addon. This pack changes the weapon models for a more classic, vanilla look.

If you're looking to make WoM feel more "traditional" then you came to the right place!

### IF THE MODELS ARE NOT LOADING PROPERLY TRY F3+T OR RESTARTING THE GAME

`This resource pack heavily relies on the latest versions of forge for 1.20.1 and 1.19.2, please keep it up to date or it might not work as intended`
